name: Tool Use
desc: The ability of an AI agent to invoke external functions or APIs.

name: On-Device LLM
desc: Large Language Models optimized for edge devices (phones, IoT).

name: CVE-2026-22778 (vLLM RCE)
desc: Critical RCE vulnerability in vLLM affecting multi-modal models.

name: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE)
desc: Sparse neural architecture for efficient inference.

name: NEXUS CORTEX
desc: The decentralized cognitive core of Lostlight Portal.

name: PDF to Markdown Conversion
desc: Process of converting unstructured PDF documents to structured Markdown.

name: MLIR (Multi-Level Intermediate Representation)
desc: Next generation compiler infrastructure replacing XLA.

name: Quadratic Complexity O(N^2)
desc: The fundamental compute bottleneck of standard Transformers.

name: Infinite Context
desc: Ability to process context windows of unlimited length.

name: 🧠 NEXUS CORTEX: Cognitive Synthesis Protocol (认知合成协议)
Ⅱ. Usage Guide (使用指南 - Nexus CLI)
Check Brain Health & Entropy (检查大脑健康与熵值)
Search Concepts via Synaptic Associative Search (图增强检索 / 联想匹配)
Check Subconscious Intuitions (查看潜意识推演)
Run Daily Evolution Cycle (运行每日进化循环)
Clear Temporary Cache Targets (清除临时缓存，保护状态文件)

System Philosophy & Identity (系统哲学与身份定位)
3. Cognitive Immune & Structure System (认知免疫与结构关系类型)
MCP Server
desc: Provides context, tools, and prompts to clients securely.

name: MCP Client
desc: Maintains 1:1 connections with servers via Host apps like Claude Desktop.

name: MCP Resources
desc: Data context exposed by servers (e.g., files, APIs, databases) using URIs.

name: MCP Tools
desc: Executable functions exposed by servers, modeled on JSON Schema.

name: ReAct Agent
desc: Agent reasoning framework combining Reasoning and Acting loops.

name: Agent Memory Architecture
desc: Stateful graph, RAG, and Ephemeral/Persistent memories.

name: Function Calling
desc: LLM capability to output JSON matching a requested schema to execute tools.

name: Structured Output
desc: Enforcing strict schema adherence for LLM responses.

name: Dynamic Skill Matrix
desc: Loading and unloading tools/skills at runtime based on task context.

name: Prompt Engineering
desc: Designing inputs to guide LLMs toward desired behaviors or outputs.

name: Context Engineering
desc: Dynamically constructing and managing the context window with relevant data.

name: Context Window
desc: The maximum token capacity an LLM can process in a single prompt.

name: Chain of Thought (CoT)
desc: Prompting LLMs to output intermediate reasoning steps before answering.

name: Few-Shot Prompting
desc: Providing a few examples within the prompt to guide LLM formatting and reasoning.

name: Retrieval-Augmented Generation
desc: Fetching external knowledge bases to augment the LLM's context window before generation.

name: NEXUS System
desc: 系统自身的全局概念，即主权智能体架构。

name: Project Configuration
desc: 工程项目的元数据与构建基础设施

name: PagedAttention
desc: vLLM的核心技术，受操作系统虚拟内存启发，用于高效管理KV Cache。

name: Dual-Write Mechanism
desc: 双写机制：同时写入 SQLite 缓存与 JSONL 文本持久化的安全策略。

name: Heavyweight Frameworks
desc: 传统庞大臃肿、黑盒化的AI工程框架体系。

name: Knowledge Crystallization
desc: The process of converting raw information into permanent, structured graph entities.

name: Omniscience Protocol
desc: The overarching architectural ability to ingest, map, and reflect on its own physical codebase.
